template_data.headline_html: What changes when you work the Schedule.
template_data.image_headline: THE SCHEDULE IS ACCESS. NOT A GUARANTEE.
template_data.image_prompt: Split-panel infographic on cream background. Left panel light grey, bold label 'BEFORE' at top; three short labels with faded X icons: 'ZERO AWARDS', 'NO PIPELINE', 'MISSED RECOMPETES'. Right panel dark navy, bold label 'AFTER' at top; three short labels with green checkmarks: 'FIRST AWARD', 'PIPELINE BUILT', 'BIDS IN FLIGHT'. Center: illustrated professional man in blazer reviewing a federal opportunity dashboard on a laptop. Bold headline across top: 'THE SCHEDULE IS ACCESS. NOT A GUARANTEE.' Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
